programs.title: The Streets Hong Kong
programs.desc: Dan journeys to to Hong Kong's picturesque coastal region of Sai Kung where local chef, Margaret Xu shows him the fresh local seafood on offer, before cooking him a sublime steamed crab dish. He then heads back to town in search of a restaurant that specialises in traditional Chinese sweet soups.

programs.title: River Cottage Autumn
programs.desc: It is firework time at River Cottage and Hugh's preparing for a Bonfire Night shindig.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Tonight's host is 49 year police officer Claire and she's going all out with a cruise themed menu with stop offs in Italy and China. But will a maiden voyage into vegan cooking dash her hopes to win?

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: It's the third night in Cardiff and the turn of spiritual vegan Charlotte to welcome her guests with a homely hug of a dinner including a cutch - that's Welsh for cuddle - in a bowl.

programs.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw
programs.desc: This one's for the crisp takers. Adam, hatted chef Will Houia and the Wolf of Wok Street Vincent Lim are all about their crispy business.

programs.title: The Cook and the Chef
programs.desc: The British brought the idea of public hotels - or 'pubs' - to Australia, and they've been a prominent feature of the Australian landscape ever since.
